channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: 3m x 2m pothole which is now impacting on traffic avoiding the dangerous hole, 16th April
item.description:
The hole is getting bigger and needs to be addressed before a cyclist is injured or a car is damaged from going through it. This must be better to do sooner rather than later as the stretch is now very large. Needs to be repaired properly not patched
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 60, Longland Drive, Woodside Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:

item.title: Blak bag dumped on upper park road, 16th April
item.description:
There is a black bag dumped 10 yards from number 70 upper park road, its 1 single black bags seemed to be damp? can this be collected please as its blocking access.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Upper Park Road, Lower Belvedere, Greater London

item.title: Litter left on sidewalk after bin collection, 16th April
item.description:
It appears to have been left there after non-recyclable waste was collected this morning. It is not our own waste since ours was missed/not picked up (reported separately)
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 53, Ravensbourne Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Thames Water works, 16th April
item.description:
Hi Team, Thames Water are carrying out open cut pipe works along Chislehurst Road, Sidcup. Understand the works needs to be carried out but the length of time this is taking is absurd. This is putting 10 mins on my journey in the morning and evening 5 days a week. The best part is every day I drive past I can see no work taking place but plenty of traffic. Surely this should be 7 days working per week 7am to 7pm working hours to get through the works. The works has created several pot holes at the junction of Upperton Road. The length of the tapper is very long meaning the wait at the lights is lengthy. There is often a manual control on the tm lights but this is not helping. How long do Bexley Council envisage these works to take place? It is taking far too long and Bexley Council need to action someone to speed the works up.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 9, Chislehurst Road, Longlands, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lots of litter all over the grass and along Market Meadow road, 16th April

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Market Meadow, Poverest, Greater London

item.title: Traffic light by Anerley Town Hall/William Booth Road corner is not working, 16th April
item.description:
The traffic light is not working on all the lights for vehicles and pedestrians since yesterday afternoon (15/4), so it's been difficult for children to get across during school hours.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Anerley Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.category: Fly-tip Medium - Up to medium size van load (Parks)

item.title: The neighbors is throwing trash in inappropriate place, 16th April
item.description:
Hi there! My name is Rose, and I want to complain about my neighbors, they’re are dumping a lot of trash in an inappropriate place, causing a bad smell and attracting many rats, and it's right next to my door. I've reported this to the landlord several times, but he ignores all my messages. 1Station Parade Elmers End Road Beckenham BR3 4DR

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Shirley Crescent, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
